issues.description: SearchDeck action is incomplete. Missing filter logic for '{Supernovas} type card other than [Monkey.D.Luffy]' and missing the 'look at 5 cards' + 'place rest at bottom' mechanics. Current filter is 'Any' which does not restrict by type or exclude card name.

SearchDeck does not capture the 'look at 5 cards from top of deck, reveal up to 1' conditional selection. DSL should use a more precise filter with type='Supernovas' and exclude=[Monkey.D.Luffy], and specify searchCount:5.
Target should clarify 'up to 1' opponent character (optional selection), not mandatory. Current ChooseOpponentCharacter may imply mandatory selection.
